title: Disney Mickey Mouse 13pc Cinch Bag Drawstring Backpack Toys Bundle Kids Age 3+
description:
Is your child a Toy Story fan? Then this drawstring cinch backpack and matching set of stickers bundle is a must-have gift this year! The backpack and stickers both feature characters from the hit movie franchise: Buzz Lightyear, Woody, and more! Kids will love showing off their favorite Toy Story characters at school! The drawstring tote bag measures 18” by 13” and can easily hold your child’s school supplies and sporting gear like binders, school books, notebooks, accessories, and a water bottle. The bag features an easy-to-use cinch closure to ensure supplies stay secured in the bag when not in use. The adjustable cinch strap design provides customizable comfort that will fit most kids

Disney Mickey Mouse 13pc Cinch Bag Drawstring Backpack Toys Bundle Kids Age 3+

Bring Disney magic to school and playtime with this officially licensed Mickey Mouse gift set! Packed with fun and practical goodies, it’s perfect for any young fan.

Mickey Mouse Colored Pencils: A set of 8 vibrant pencils featuring Mickey and the Roadster Racers, perfect for coloring, drawing, and writing. Safe for kids ages 3 and up.

Key Features

  • COLORFUL MICKEY MOUSE PENCILS - A set of 8 vibrant pencils featuring Mickey and the Roadster Racers, perfect for kids’ coloring, drawing, and writing activities.
  • MICKEY NOTEBOOK AND PEN - A spiral-bound notebook with a fun "Speed Racers" design and 50 sheets for journaling, schoolwork, or doodling.
  • DURABLE HARD SHELL PENCIL CASE - Spacious and secure, featuring Mickey, Donald, and Goofy, designed to keep school supplies organized and protected.
  • FUN MICKEY JUMP ROPE - A 7-foot jump rope with Mickey Mouse graphics, ideal for both indoor and outdoor active play.
  • STYLISH DRAWSTRING BACKPACK - A roomy 18” x 13” bag with Mickey’s iconic design, perfect for carrying books, supplies, or sports gear.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: MICPRCG13PCWAL
  • UPC: 885189785340
  • Color: Multicolor
  • Size: Medium

Mickey Notebook & Pen: A spiral-bound notebook with 50 sheets and a fun "Speed Racers" design, great for journaling, schoolwork, or doodling on the go.

Hard Shell Pencil Case: Durable and spacious, this zippered case features Mickey, Donald, and Goofy, keeping school supplies secure and organized.

Jump Rope: A 7-foot jump rope with Mickey graphics, perfect for indoor or outdoor fun and active play.

Mickey Drawstring Backpack: This 18” x 13” bag is stylish and functional, ideal for carrying books, school supplies, or sports gear.
